heap.insert_start: Insert({{value}}): Place the new node at the bottom of the tree (Index {{index}})
heap.heapify_up_compare: Heapify-Up: Compare the new node ({{curVal}}) with its parent node ({{parentVal}})
heap.heapify_up_swap_min: The new node is smaller! Perform a swap (exchange values)
heap.heapify_up_swap_max: The new node is larger! Perform a swap (exchange values)
heap.extract_start_min: ExtractMin(): Prepare to remove the root node (minimum value {{extVal}})
heap.extract_start_max: ExtractMax(): Prepare to remove the root node (maximum value {{extVal}})
heap.extract_swap_last: Move the value of the last node to the root node
heap.heapify_down_compare_min: Heapify-Down: Find the smallest among the left and right child nodes
heap.heapify_down_compare_max: Heapify-Down: Find the largest among the left and right child nodes
heap.heapify_down_swap: Swap values downward to maintain the {{heapName}} property
heap.peek_min: Peek(): The current minimum value is the root node value {{extVal}}
heap.peek_max: Peek(): The current maximum value is the root node value {{extVal}}
heap.heapify_start: Heapify(): Start rebuilding the {{heapName}} from bottom to top, array length is {{length}}
heap.done: Operation completed, the {{heapName}} structure is now valid!

factorial.init: Stack Initialization: Preparing to calculate f({{targetN}})
factorial.push_start: Call f({{n}}): Preparing to push onto the stack from the right
factorial.push_assign: f({{n}}) successfully placed in the stack slot
factorial.base_case: Base Case reached: f({{n}}) = {{val}}, starting backtracking and multiplication
factorial.calc_start: Preparing to multiply the returned value of f({{current_f}}-1) ({{child_val}}) by current value ({{current_val}})
factorial.pop_right: f({{returned_f}}) completed returning {{returned_val}}, popped and exiting to the right
factorial.done: Recursion complete! Final result f({{final_result}}) calculated successfully
